g.title: Threading
g.text: Main thread: App loop, window events, rendering, host pump
Nvim path: NvimRpc owns a reader thread for msgpack-RPC notifications
Host wakeups: background I/O requests frame via IHostCallbacks::wake_window()
Terminal local process I/O is drained/coalesced by host pump before rendering

g.title: NvimPath
g.text: nvim redraw -> NvimRpc -> UiEventHandler -> Grid -> GridRenderingPipeline -> Renderer

g.title: TerminalPath
g.text: PTY output -> VtParser/TerminalHostBase -> Grid -> GridRenderingPipeline -> Renderer
